---
title: "Slides"
---

Use this section for the single live workshop deck and the standalone speaking notes that go with it.

## Workshop Materials

- [Matching and Weighting Workshop Deck](matching_workshop.qmd)
- [Workshop Speaking Notes](matching_workshop_notes.qmd)

## Suggested Delivery Flow

1. Keep the workshop deck aligned with `articles/matching_methods_report.qmd`.
2. Keep the main report open during the worked-example segment of the talk.
3. Use the speaking notes page when you want timing prompts, transitions, and lab instructions outside presenter view.
4. Hand off first to the Black Politicians lab, then to NSW + CPS, HISP, or Titanic depending on the session goal.
5. Keep the deck tied to the evaluated-code and QA outputs so the workshop stays auditable.
